key.name: llm-provider
key.description: The LLM backend to use: ollama, openai, or anthropic.

key.name: llm-model
key.description: The model identifier for the selected provider.

key.name: llm-api-key
key.description: API key for cloud providers. Stored via libsecret at runtime.

key.name: llm-system-prompt
key.default: "You are Rook, a helpful AI assistant."
key.description: The system prompt sent with every request.

key.name: tts-voice
key.description: Sherpa-ONNX TTS voice model to use.

key.name: wake-word-enabled
key.description: Whether to listen for the wake word.

key.name: voice-model
key.description: The LLM model to use for voice wake-word queries (provider_id:model_name format).

key.name: microphone-device
key.description: Audio input device. Empty for system default.

key.name: speaker-device
key.description: Audio output device. Empty for system default.

key.name: whisper-suppress-nst
key.description: Filter non-speech tokens like [Music], [Applause], [Laughter] from transcription output.

key.name: whisper-no-speech-thold
key.description: Silence detection threshold for whisper. Range 0.0–1.0. Higher = less false positives in silence.

key.name: whisper-entropy-thold
key.description: Decoder entropy threshold for whisper. Range 0.0–6.0. Higher = discards more low-confidence output, reducing hallucinations.

key.name: whisper-no-fallback
key.description: Disable temperature fallback during decoding. Prevents whisper from generating text when uncertain.

key.name: whisper-threads
key.description: Number of threads for whisper inference. Range 1–16. Higher = faster on multi-core CPUs.

key.name: whisper-beam-size
key.description: Beam search width. Range 1–5. 1 = fastest, 5 = best accuracy.

key.name: whisper-best-of
key.description: Number of best candidates. Range 1–5. 1 = fastest, 5 = best accuracy.

key.name: whisper-audio-ctx
key.description: Audio context window in tokens. Range 0–2048. 0 = auto, 512 = fast. Smaller = faster encode.

key.name: whisper-model
key.description: Model size for speech recognition. tiny (fastest/75MB), base (142MB), small (466MB, default), medium (1.5GB), large-v3 (2.9GB, best).

key.name: voice-silence-threshold
key.description: RMS energy below which audio is considered silence. Range 0–500. 0=never skip, 80=quiet room, 200=noisy environment.

key.name: voice-barge-in-threshold
key.description: RMS energy above which speech is considered a barge-in interrupt. Range 50–5000. Lower = more sensitive, 500=normal speech.

key.name: language
key.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the UI.
